component.name: CachyOS Theme Studio
component.summary: Guided desktop theme manager for CachyOS

description.p: CachyOS Theme Studio helps create, preview, apply, and roll back Linux desktop themes from one guided workflow.
It generates coordinated theme output for KDE Plasma, GTK, and Kvantum, with live previews, apply-readiness checks, saved snapshots, compare tools, and rollback safety.
Initial packaged release with guided workflow, desktop integration, and release checks.
